name: Bacon Quiche Lorraine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Bake pastry shell for five minutes.
3. Remove from oven and set temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Fry bacon until crisp, then drain and crumble.
5. Cook onion until transparent in a small amount of bacon fat; drain.
6. Sprinkle bacon and onion over the bottom of the pastry shell.
7. Cover with cheese.
8. Blend together eggs, milk, and seasonings.
9. Pour mixture over the cheese.
10. Bake for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 30 to 35 minutes longer or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
